rationale: Open WebUI Filters intercept messages at inlet (pre-NIM) and outlet (post-NIM). This config defines the production filter chain. Each filter has a single responsibility and can be independently disabled.

inlet_filters.name: RPM Guard
inlet_filters.action: count_requests_in_60s_window. Reject with HTTP 429 if count >= 32.
inlet_filters.rationale: Prevents NIM API quota exhaustion. Free Tier throttling produces hard errors that break the session. Proactive rejection at the gateway is cleaner than an upstream 429.

inlet_filters.name: Credential Scrub
inlet_filters.action: Scan inlet message for API keys, passwords, tokens (pattern: nvapi-, sk-, Bearer). Redact before NIM call. Log redaction event.
inlet_filters.rationale: Users occasionally paste credentials into chat. Sending them to NIM creates an external data exposure risk.

inlet_filters.name: Task Classifier
inlet_filters.action: Classify query into task_class. Attach as message metadata. Used by downstream profile selector.
inlet_filters.rationale: Task classification must happen before NIM call to select the correct parameter profile and reasoning budget.

inlet_filters.name: Profile Selector
inlet_filters.action: Map task_class to parameter profile. Override model parameters (temperature, max_tokens, reasoning_budget) for this request.
inlet_filters.rationale: Open WebUI Filter inlet can modify body.options before the NIM call. Profile switching must happen here.

inlet_filters.name: Context Budget Enforcer
inlet_filters.action: Measure total context tokens (system + history + memory + rag + message). If > 65536, truncate oldest conversation history first. Preserve system prompt and last 3 turns.
inlet_filters.rationale: Unbounded context growth on Free Tier produces extreme latency and eventual context overflow errors. Proactive truncation prevents both.

outlet_filters.name: Response Length Monitor
outlet_filters.action: Measure output token count against task_class length target. Log if response exceeds 1.5x target. Do not truncate — only log for benchmark tracking.
outlet_filters.rationale: Over-generation is a quality metric, not just a cost metric. Logging creates the dataset needed to tune length targets per task class.

outlet_filters.name: Hallucination Flag Checker
outlet_filters.action: Scan outlet for [verify] tags. Count and log per turn. Surface count in session metadata.
outlet_filters.rationale: [verify] tag frequency is a leading indicator of hallucination risk in a session. High frequency should trigger human review.

outlet_filters.name: Citation Validator
outlet_filters.action: When RAG was used in inlet, verify outlet contains at least one [Source: ...] citation. Log if absent.
outlet_filters.rationale: RAG without citation violates the knowledge policy. Outlet check enforces the citation contract without requiring NIM to self-police.
